name: Patient 3
history: PhD candidate in scientific research. Works with senior scientist struggling for recognition. References to colleague Kelly.
intermediate_belief: Unless I work harder than everyone else and publish more, I'm a fraud.
intermediate_belief_depression: My work has no real value; I'm just pretending to be a scientist.
coping_strategies: Constant comparison to others, overworking, minimizing own achievements.
situation: Comparing themselves to colleagues who work longer hours and publish more papers.
auto_thought: "I'll never be as good as them. My work is meaningless. I'm falling behind."
behavior: Procrastination, avoidance of lab work, spending excessive time reading others' papers instead of writing.
